summary: Spec review accepts the bounded Xiaohongshu read capability conversion for Lode #198.
reviewed_validation_summary: `python3 tools/lode_validate_package.py sites/xiaohongshu/search-notes --registry-index registry/local-packages.json --json`; `python3 tools/lode_validate_package.py sites/xiaohongshu/read-note-detail --registry-index registry/local-packages.json --json`; `python3 tools/lode_validate_package.py --registry-index registry/local-packages.json --all --json`; `python3 -m py_compile tools/lode_validate_package.py`; `git diff --check`; `loom doctor --target . --json`; `loom verify --target . --json`; `loom fact-chain --target . --json`; `loom suite validate --target . --item LODE-205 --json`; `loom suite evidence validate --target . --item LODE-205 --json`; `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item LODE-205 --json` passed locally. Hosted py-compile, demo-bootstrap, repo-local-cli, and loom-check passed on PR #221 run 28771263137. Live Xiaohongshu page validation remains pending human-owned logged-in runtime and is not fabricated.
follow_ups: Real Xiaohongshu validation must be run later in a human-owned logged-in Harbor identity session before claiming live-site completion.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: The spec stays inside Lode site capability/package/catalog truth and excludes account custody, login automation, batch crawling, write/engagement actions, Harbor runtime launch, Core execution, and App UI.

implementation_review_disposition.reason: Implementation is limited to capability package assets, registry fixtures, docs, validators, and item-specific carrier.
